full_text:
Wang Lei 王累
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lei (王累)was born in Guanghan. Minister of Liu Zhang. Strongly advised Zhang to not allow Liu Bei into Yi. Wang Lei was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Wang Lei lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
